scopeNote: SYBEORG only. Radi / House of Meroe targets, drafts, files, and accounts are excluded.

candidateScores.business: Golden Rule Plumbing Heating Cooling & Electrical

leads.gmbSignals: OSM/public listing showed plumber category, website https://qualityplumbingmarion.com, phone +1-319-373-4114; public rating not visible in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: Official URL redirected to localhero.com/when-to-call-a-plumber-essential-signs-and-tips-to-avoid-costly-disasters/ during 2026-06-19 fetch.
Fetched page title was 'When to Call a Plumber: Essential Signs and Tips to Avoid Costly Disasters'.
leads.diagnosis: Public website path redirects to unrelated plumbing article/lead-gen style content instead of a Quality Plumbing service page.
leads.bestHook: Listed website appears to leak visitors into a confusing third-party article before they can call Quality Plumbing.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Concrete public bug in a high-intent plumbing vertical; easy to explain without insulting the business.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Visual sample makes the bug fix obvious: replace confusing redirect with call-first plumbing path.
leads.designDifferentiation: Light water/cream visual system with problem-selector dispatch card; not a dark contractor hero and not a quote-form-first layout.
leads.visualQaNotes: Browser visual QA passed as a credible, distinct concept with local context and call-first hierarchy. Main caveat: it intentionally reads like a business-owner concept/audit page more than a final customer-facing site; add real logo/photos/hours before production.
leads.subject: quick website path issue for Quality Plumbing
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Quality Plumbing team — I was reviewing Marion/Cedar Rapids plumbing listings and noticed the public website URL I found for Quality Plumbing redirected to a LocalHero article instead of a clear Quality Plumbing service page. If someone is dealing with a leak or water-heater issue, that detour could be enough for them to back out and call another plumber.

I made a sample concept showing a cleaner first screen with your public phone number, problem paths, and a mobile tap-to-call button: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/quality-plumbing-marion/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: OSM/public listing showed plumber category, website http://www.premierplumbing.org/, phone 515-965-0714 / 866-965-0714, city Ankeny; public rating not visible in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: Homepage returned HTTP 200 with title 'Coming Soon'.
Fetched page was about 1.5KB and exposed phone numbers but no service detail/form/navigation.
leads.diagnosis: Placeholder website gives too little information for comparison-shopping plumbing prospects.
leads.bestHook: A minimum useful one-page site would be a clear upgrade over the current coming-soon screen.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Small first offer, visible public issue, high-intent vertical.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: A sample page demonstrates the specific replacement for the coming-soon screen.
leads.designDifferentiation: Warm paper/copper editorial presence; not another dark emergency trade page.
leads.visualQaNotes: Browser visual QA passed as a credible, distinct warm local concept. Main caveat: it reads as a strategic coming-soon replacement proposal rather than final homeowner-facing content; add real branding/services/hours/photos before production.
leads.subject: sample replacement for Premier Plumbing’s coming-soon page
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Premier Plumbing team — I was looking at Ankeny plumbing listings and saw the public Premier Plumbing website loading as a short 'Coming Soon' page. It does show a phone number, but it does not give homeowners much context before they choose who to call.

I put together a sample one-page concept showing how the first screen could make the phone number, service categories, and request path clearer: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/premier-plumbing-ankeny/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: OSM/public listing showed website https://www.arriagalawn.com and phone +1-515-808-2442; public rating not visible in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: Official URL returned HTTP 404-style page with title 'SITE NOT FOUND'.
leads.bestHook: Helpful alert that listed site is not loading as a real website.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Urgent visible bug; useful even before selling anything.
leads.recommendedChannel: manual/phone only until public email verified
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Mockup skipped to avoid generic landscaping page before real services/photos are verified.
leads.subject: quick website not-found note for Arriaga Lawn Maintenance
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Arriaga Lawn Maintenance team — the public website URL I found for Arriaga Lawn Maintenance loaded a 'SITE NOT FOUND' page today. If that is the listing customers are clicking from search, it may be blocking people before they see your services or phone number.

I did not send anything or make changes — just flagging it. If useful, I can have SYBEORG mock up a simple lawn-care/service-area page so you can see the cleaner version. If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: OSM/public listing showed HVAC category, phone +1-515-262-9694, city Des Moines. Listed/searched domain failed DNS resolution in this pass.
verifiedEvidence: www.finiconditionedair.com failed DNS resolution during fetch.
leads.diagnosis: Possible broken domain/listing path; needs manual verification before outreach names the domain as official.
leads.bestHook: If this domain is still listed anywhere public, customers hit a dead end.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Broken domain plus HVAC urgency, but domain source should be verified before contact.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped until the active official domain/listing route is verified.
leads.subject: quick domain/listing note for Fini Conditioned Air
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Fini Conditioned Air team — I tried the public domain I found for Fini Conditioned Air today and it did not resolve. If that domain is still connected to any customer-facing listing, people may be hitting a dead end before they can request HVAC help.

I can mock up a simple replacement call-first HVAC page if you want to see what a cleaner first screen could look like. If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: OSM/public listing showed website https://www.generaltreeia.com/, phone +1-319-354-2838, city Iowa City. Official site fetch surfaced generaltreeserviceiacity@gmail.com and phone numbers (319) 354-2838 / (319) 219-8146.
verifiedEvidence: Functional website title: Tree Care | Iowa | General Tree Service.
Public Gmail and phone numbers found in official site HTML.
unsafeOrUnverifiedClaims: specific services beyond tree care without further review
leads.diagnosis: Functional site; strongest angle is local profile/contact/service-path cleanup rather than urgent rebuild.
leads.bestHook: Respectful local-profile/service-path improvement, not a website teardown.
leads.whyThisShouldClose: Public email exists and angle is friendly; avoid overbuilding until real photos/reviews are collected.
leads.mockupDecisionReason: Skipped to avoid a generic tree-service page without verified photos/reviews.
leads.subject: quick local-profile idea for General Tree Service
leads.draftCopy:
Hi General Tree Service team — I came across your Iowa City tree-care listing and website today. Nothing urgent or negative here; the opportunity I noticed is mostly around making the path from search to 'request tree help' clearer for seasonal work, storm cleanup, trimming, and removal.

If useful, I can put together a sample page/profile cleanup concept using only verified info from your site and public listing. If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.
